ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mesh_types" (
  "mesh_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mesh type */,
  "mesh_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mesh type (e.g., Linear Hexahedron, Linear Tetrahedron) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mesh type */,
  "mesh_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the mesh type (e.g., Linear, Quadratic) */,
  "mesh_type_dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the mesh type (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mesh_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mesh_sizes" (
  "mesh_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mesh size */,
  "mesh_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the mesh size (e.g., Coarse, Fine) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mesh size */,
  "mesh_size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the mesh size (e.g., meters, millimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mesh_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fea_software" (
  "fea_software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FEA software */,
  "fea_software_name" TEXT /* Name of the FEA software (e.g., Code_Aster, Elmer, Calculix) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FEA software */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the FEA software */,
  "software_license" TEXT /* License information for the FEA software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fea_software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "mesh_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mesh type used for the result */,
  "mesh_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mesh size used for the result */,
  "fea_software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FEA software used for the result */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value obtained from the FEA analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time taken for the analysis */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_mesh_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mesh_type_id") REFERENCES mesh_types ("mesh_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_fea_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("fea_software_id") REFERENCES fea_software ("fea_software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_mesh_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("mesh_size_id") REFERENCES mesh_sizes ("mesh_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "mesh_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mesh type used for the upload */,
  "mesh_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mesh size used for the upload */,
  "fea_software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FEA software used for the upload */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., Pending, Successful, Failed) */,
  "upload_message" TEXT /* Error message or feedback from the upload process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_mesh_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mesh_type_id") REFERENCES mesh_types ("mesh_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_fea_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("fea_software_id") REFERENCES fea_software ("fea_software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_mesh_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("mesh_size_id") REFERENCES mesh_sizes ("mesh_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upload being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the upload */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the upload was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES uploads ("upload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mesh_type_properties" (
  "mesh_type_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mesh type property */,
  "mesh_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mesh type */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., number of nodes, elements) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mesh_type_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mesh_type_properties_mesh_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mesh_type_id") REFERENCES mesh_types ("mesh_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fea_software_settings" (
  "fea_software_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FEA software setting */,
  "fea_software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FEA software */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., solver, tolerance) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fea_software_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fea_software_settings_fea_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("fea_software_id") REFERENCES fea_software ("fea_software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_settings" (
  "analysis_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis setting */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., boundary conditions, material properties) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_settings_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)
